title: Senior Teacher - CL Educate - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - CL Educate - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
CL Educate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Teacher at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CL Educate:
CL Educate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate!
